name: @mariozechner/pi-web-ui
description: Reusable web UI components for AI chat interfaces powered by @mariozechner/pi-ai

scripts.build: vp exec tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && vp exec tailwindcss -i ./src/app.css -o ./dist/app.css --minify
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "build,example" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "vp exec tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "vp exec tailwindcss -i ./src/app.css -o ./dist/app.css --watch" "vp run pi-web-ui-example#dev"
scripts.dev:tsc: concurrently --names "build" --prefix-colors "cyan" "vp exec tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "vp exec tailwindcss -i ./src/app.css -o ./dist/app.css --watch"
scripts.check: vp exec biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && vp exec tsc --noEmit && vp run pi-web-ui-example#check

author: Mario Zechner
